name: grapesjs
when_to_use: 需要让用户可视化拖拽拼装/就地编辑一个页面、邮件或模板(builder UI)并导出 HTML/CSS 时用它,而非只渲染固定内容——block 管理、style 管理、图层树、撤销、设备预览是数千行工程;要自由白板画图用 excalidraw。注意:它向 document.head 注样式且画布是 iframe,不适合 widget/shadow 载体,走 artifact/codex 全页。
why_valuable: 一个无代码网页/页面/邮件构建器(拖 block 进画布、就地编辑、面板改样式、导出 HTML/CSS)是 block manager + style manager + 图层树 + undo + 设备预览的组合,远超 AI 单个 artifact 手写量。

en.when_to_use: Use it when users need to visually drag, assemble, and edit a page, email, or template in place (a builder UI) and export HTML/CSS, rather than merely render fixed content; block management, style management, a layer tree, undo, and device previews are thousands of lines of engineering. Use excalidraw for a free-form drawing canvas. Note: it injects styles into document.head and its canvas is an iframe, so it does not suit widget/shadow carriers; use a full-page artifact/codex carrier.
en.why_valuable: A no-code web/page/email builder (drag blocks onto a canvas, edit in place, change styles in panels, and export HTML/CSS) combines a block manager, style manager, layer tree, undo, and device previews, far beyond what AI can hand-write in one artifact.

data_in.note: Input is initial content (HTML/CSS) plus mount and behavior configuration; retrieve output with editor.getHtml() / editor.getCss(). storageManager:false is recommended to disable remote storage. The +esm build is heavy at about 1.16MB.

schema.container: HTMLElement -- required mount point (passed to init)
schema.components?: string(HTML) | object[] -- initial content, empty by default
schema.style?: string(CSS) | object[] -- initial styles, empty by default
schema.fromElement?: boolean -- parse initial content from container.innerHTML, default false
schema.height?: string -- for example '600px'; do not use vh
schema.storageManager?: false | object -- false is recommended to disable remote storage

spec.note: The editor UI (panels plus iframe canvas) needs ample height; pass height as a string such as '600px'. Do not use vh or percentage heights.

data_in.note: 输入是初始内容(HTML/CSS)+ 挂载与行为配置;产物经 editor.getHtml() / editor.getCss() 取回。建议 storageManager:false 关闭远端存储。~1.16MB +esm,较重。

schema.container: HTMLElement —— 必填挂载点(init 传入)
schema.components?: string(HTML) | object[] —— 初始内容,默认空
schema.style?: string(CSS) | object[] —— 初始样式,默认空
schema.fromElement?: boolean —— 从 container.innerHTML 解析初始内容,默认 false
schema.storageManager?: false | object —— 建议 false 关闭远端存储

spec.note: 编辑器 UI(面板 + iframe 画布)须要充足高度;height 配置传字符串如 '600px',禁 vh/百分比高。

boot.widget: // widget 不推荐:grapesjs 运行时向 document.head 注入样式且编辑画布是 <iframe>,无法满足 shadow 零足迹铁律。如必须嵌入,退回 artifact/codex 全页载体。

uplink: 编辑成品(HTML/CSS)由消费 AI 主动调 editor.getHtml()/getCss() 取回并按载体外传;不预设自动上行。

carriers.widget: not-recommended:运行时向 document.head 注样式 + iframe 画布,非 shadow-clean
carriers.codex: supported:全页挂载 container,~1.16MB +esm 较重但可加载

isolation.evidence: +esm exports {default, grapesjs, usePlugin};default.init(config:EditorConfig):Editor 已验证(init@17418;EditorConfig.container/components/style/fromElement/height/width/storageManager/plugins 见 12646-12893;editor.getHtml()/getCss() 16857/16870)。globalStyleInjection=yes:运行时写 document.head(document.head ×3、head.appendChild ×1、querySelector('head') ×1),超出外链 dist/css/grapes.min.css。globalDomMutation=yes 且 shadowCompatible=no:编辑画布是真 <iframe>(createElement('iframe')),Backbone/Underscore 应用(~1.16MB +esm)在 document 作用域查询/测量,非 shadow-clean。artifact/codex 全页挂载 container 可用,getHtml()/getCss() 取成品。

minimal.components:
Build pages visually

Drag, drop, and edit blocks — then export clean HTML & CSS. No code required.

Get Started
